full_text:
Wang Qin
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Qinwas born in Donglai. Sent by He Kui in 200 to defeat bandit Wang Ying. Wang Qin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
